schema.description: Import of Pre-Shared Keys for multiple devices.

deviceId.description: The unique ID of the device.

secretKey.description: Pre-shared secret key for a device.

format.description: The format in which the secret key was provided.

schema.title: Pre-Shared Keys import request.

body.description: Array of objects containing deviceId (same as iccid for 1NCE sims) and PreSharedKey.
